headline: Pitcher Partners with EasyPicky To Unlock the Full Potential of CPG Shelf Data
summary: Pitcher, the AI-native sales enablement platform for enterprise commercial teams, today announced a strategic partnership with EasyPicky, a specialist in retail execution optimization and field data collection for consumer goods companies.

headline: 5 High-Yield Stocks and ETFs to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade
summary: Five high-yield names spanning pharmaceuticals, consumer staples, energy, and ETFs offer income investors compelling yields and durable businesses for a ten-year hold.

headline: The OREO Brand & BTS Movement is On! Introducing the Limited-Edition OREO & BTS Cookies
summary: OREO and BTS fans, get ready for an OREO cookie BTS made just for you. That's right: RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook are joining forces with the world's #1 cookie to drop the Limited-Edition OREO & BTS Cookies, a brown sugar–pancake flavoured OREO cookie created by BTS and dedicated to BTS fans. This collaboration will kick off a playful global movement across 80+ markets with BTS and the OREO brand.

headline: The use of AI in food NPD is changing
summary: Seeking an edge, food manufacturers are looking at different ways of using AI in their NPD processes.
